# YAAIIC Copilot Instructions

## Instruction Files

The following files contain the authoritative rules for this project. Read the relevant file(s) before working on any task in that area.

| File | When to apply |
|------|--------------|
| [`.claude/rules/client.md`](../.claude/rules/client.md) | Working on anything in `public/` — frontend architecture, component strategy, styling, theming |
| [`.claude/rules/server.md`](../.claude/rules/server.md) | Working on anything in `server/` — domain structure, service/repository pattern, data storage |
| [`.claude/rules/planning.md`](../.claude/rules/planning.md) | Writing or updating `task.md` — task file format, goals, checklists, implementation details |
